basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raebareli Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of Research Assistant posts at AIIMS Raebareli. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Raebareli Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Computer Science / Life Sciences/Neuroscience/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology or related discipline from a recognized university
qualification.details: Bachelor Degree in Computer Science / Life Sciences/Neuroscience/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology or related discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Raebareli recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the AIIMS Raebareli recruitment is Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Research Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is not explicitly mentioned, but the walk-in interview is scheduled for 12 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor Degree in Computer Science / Life Sciences/Neuroscience/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology or a related discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years, with relaxations applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The offered salary is Rs. 12,000 per month (Lump sum).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli, Uttar Pradesh, 229405.
